name: American Beauty
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the red food coloring with instant cocoa powder and set aside.
2. Cream together the shortening, granulated sugar, and eggs until smooth.
3. Add the colored mixture to the creamed ingredients and mix well.
4. Gradually add the buttermilk, sifted cake flour, salt, vanilla extract, vinegar, and baking soda, mixing until well combined.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-35 minutes.
For the icing:
1. Cream together unsalted butter, remaining shortening, and vanilla extract until smooth.
2. Gradually add the remaining flour, one tablespoon at a time, while beating continuously.
3. Add the remaining buttermilk and beat well to achieve a smooth consistency.
